title: Data Blueprint
description: Master the art of taming raw data — before any model, before any code, the data must be shaped. Learn inspection techniques, missing value treatment, outlier detection, and structured transformation pipelines that form the bedrock of every serious data project.
shortDescription: Master the art of taming raw data — before any model, before any code, the data must be shaped.

title: Scrub Radius
description: A timed challenge: clean the chaos, structure the noise, and prove your data wrangling precision. You'll receive a deliberately corrupted real-world dataset and must clean, validate, and deliver it production-ready within the time limit — speed and accuracy both count.
shortDescription: A timed challenge: clean the chaos, structure the noise, and prove your data wrangling precision.

title: Signal Architect
description: Learn to decode patterns hidden in data through exploratory data analysis and business intelligence frameworks. Dive deep into correlation matrices, distribution analysis, and the art of hypothesis generation — uncovering the signal hidden in noise.
shortDescription: Learn to decode patterns hidden in data through exploratory analysis and business intelligence frameworks.

title: Pixel Strike
description: A data visualization and EDA sprint — build dashboards that reveal, not just display. Participants will transform a provided dataset into a compelling BI dashboard, judged on insight depth, visual clarity, and storytelling power.
shortDescription: A data visualization and EDA sprint — build dashboards that reveal, not just display.

title: The Synthesis
description: Build, train, and evaluate predictive models — bridging statistical intuition with machine learning practice. Covers feature engineering, model selection, hyperparameter tuning, and cross-validation strategies across regression, classification, and ensemble methods.
shortDescription: Build, train, and evaluate predictive models — bridging statistical intuition with machine learning practice.

title: Kinetic Overload
description: A large-scale prediction challenge designed to test your model-building skills under real constraints. Work with big datasets, optimize for leaderboard accuracy, and navigate compute constraints — the closest thing to a real Kaggle competition in a campus setting.
shortDescription: A large-scale prediction challenge designed to test your model-building skills under real constraints.

title: Pareto Protocol
description: Learn the final 20% that delivers 80% of impact — deploying, packaging, and presenting data solutions. Covers FastAPI, Streamlit, Docker basics, and communication strategies for turning a Jupyter notebook into a product anyone can use.
shortDescription: Learn the final 20% that delivers 80% of impact — deploying, packaging, and presenting data solutions.

title: Omni Pareto
description: The Foundry Series finale — a full-stack data hackathon where every skill from Chapters I–III converges. Teams receive a real-world problem statement and must deliver a complete solution: cleaned data, insights, model, and a live demo — all within 24 hours.
shortDescription: The Foundry Series finale — a full-stack data hackathon where every skill from Chapters I–III converges.
